name: Croak and Dagger
tagline: Sensei's Top + any top-caster (Bolas's Citadel / One with the Multiverse / Fortune Teller's Talent / The Reality Chip) + Aetherflux Reservoir -> loop the library -> Pay 50: deal 50 (counter-immune); Torment of Hailfire grind backup
idea: The deck assembles a redundant "Topdeck Matters" loop and converts it into a counter-immune burst.

briefKills.line: Sensei's Top + a top-caster (Bolas's Citadel / One with the Multiverse / Fortune Teller's L2 / Reality Chip) + Aetherflux Reservoir → loop Top casts → bank 50+ life → Pay 50: deal 50 to each opponent (a counter-immune ability)
same loop, Ancient Cellarspawn as the payoff (drain on each under-costed cast) → every free / discounted Top recast drains an opponent → table (redundant 2nd payoff)

openings: Weakest axis — Durability (4/5): the judges' soft spot.
Redundant 3-category combo (4 enablers x 2 payoffs); ramp -> Torment is the MANA-gated backup.
Decap never-closes in 10% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 10% of the time.

clock.src: lab glarb_inevitable_lab FULL @20k on croak-and-dagger-20260701.txt (honest dig=selection; 2026-07-01 promotion)
clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T9; the full table around T9.

gamePlan: The deck assembles a redundant "Topdeck Matters" loop and converts it into a counter-immune burst. **Sensei's Divining Top** ({T}: draw a card, then put Top back on top of the library) is the loop core; any **no-mana-value-restriction top-caster** — Bolas's Citadel (pay life = mana value), One with the Multiverse (one free cast/turn), Fortune Teller's Talent at level 2, or The Reality Chip — lets you recast Top off the top each iteration, chaining through the library. With a **payoff** online — Aetherflux Reservoir (gain 1 life per spell cast this turn, then "Pay 50 life: deal 50 to any target," an *ability* that can't be countered) or Ancient Cellarspawn (drain an opponent on every under-costed cast) — the loop banks arbitrary life and flings 50 at each opponent, or drains the table one cast at a time. Inevitability comes from **redundancy, not one combo**: four interchangeable enablers × two payoffs, stacked onto the top by non-GC topdeck tutors (Insidious Dreams, Emergent Ultimatum, Scheming Symmetry) and fed by Glarb's surveil, Sylvan Library, and Oracle of Mul Daya. Underneath the combo sits the old grind shell — 38 lands, Cabal Coffers + Urborg, and **Torment of Hailfire** as a board-independent X-drain backup for the ~10% of games the combo bricks — plus a full counter suite and **Tidal Barracuda** (a one-sided Grand Abolisher on your own turn) to protect the kill.
winLine: Sensei's Top + any top-caster (Bolas's Citadel / One with the Multiverse / Fortune Teller's Talent / The Reality Chip) + Aetherflux Reservoir -> loop the library -> Pay 50: deal 50 (counter-immune); Torment of Hailfire grind backup

finishers.name: Aetherflux loop
finishers.note: Sensei's Divining Top + any top-caster (Bolas's Citadel / One with the Multiverse / Fortune Teller's Talent L2 / The Reality Chip) + **Aetherflux Reservoir** all in play.

finishers.name: Cellarspawn drain
finishers.note: the same loop with **Ancient Cellarspawn** as the payoff — every free/discounted Top recast (mana spent < mana value) drains the difference from an opponent, grinding the table out one cast at a time.

finishers.name: Topdeck-tutored assembly
finishers.note: Insidious Dreams (discard X → stack X cards on top in any order), Emergent Ultimatum (find 3 monocolored, cast 2 free), or Scheming Symmetry stacks the missing loop category on top for Glarb/Citadel; GSZ / Chord / Finale fetch the creature pieces (Ancient Cellarspawn, The Reality Chip).

finishers.name: Torment of Hailfire
finishers.note: X=12+ off ~14 mana via Cabal Coffers + Urborg — a board-independent table drain for the ~10% of games the combo never assembles.

finishers.name: Value grind
finishers.note: Seedborn Muse + Glarb top-casting deploy Archon of Cruelty / Massacre Wurm and grind a focused opponent out when nothing else is up.

rulings.name: The Top loop needs a no-MV-restriction top-caster
rulings.note: Bolas's Citadel / One with the Multiverse / Fortune Teller's Talent (level 2) / The Reality Chip. Glarb alone cannot recast Sensei's Top (it's MV1, and his top-cast is restricted to MV4+); Glarb digs and casts the big pieces, the enabler runs the Top loop.

rulings.name: Aetherflux Reservoir
rulings.note: gains "1 life for each spell you've cast this turn" (escalating — the nth cast this turn gains n), and "Pay 50 life: deal 50 damage to any target" is an activated ability — it can't be countered and hits one target per activation, so bank the life, then fling 50 at each opponent in turn.

rulings.name: Bolas's Citadel
rulings.note: casts from the top cost life equal to mana value (not mana). Watch your life total; get the payoff / lifegain online before digging deep.

rulings.name: Tidal Barracuda
rulings.note: "your opponents can't cast spells during your turn" (a one-sided Grand Abolisher that protects the combo turn), but it also lets any player cast at flash, so opponents gain flash on their turns. Combo on your own turn.

rulings.name: Ancient Cellarspawn
rulings.note: drains only when mana spent < mana value — it needs a free or discounted cast (One with the Multiverse's free cast, Savvy Trader / Fortune Teller L3 reductions) to trigger; a normally-paid spell does nothing.

rulings.name: Emergent Ultimatum
rulings.note: finds three monocolored cards with different names; an opponent shuffles one back and you cast the other two for free — Glarb, most tutors, and the payoffs are monocolored, so grab an enabler + a payoff.

rulings.name: Seedborn Muse
rulings.note: untaps Glarb and all your lands on every opponent's turn — surveil, hold up counters, and free-cast off the top each turn cycle without skipping development.

rulings.name: Valley Floodcaller
rulings.note: flash-enables your noncreature spells and untaps Glarb (a Frog) on each noncreature cast — chain surveils and casts in a single turn.

keep.mixed: redundant 3-category combo (4 enablers x 2 payoffs); ramp -> Torment is the MANA-gated backup

mull.strategy: Finding-gated: keep 2–4 lands with a way toward the pieces — Glarb castable on curve, Sensei's Top, an enabler, or a topdeck tutor. Ramp-heavy hands are also keepable (they power the Torment/Coffers backup). Toss no-land spell hands and hands with a payoff but no engine behind it. The deck's redundancy does the finding — keep A/B testing (glarb_inevitable_lab, 2026-07-03) showed plan-mulliganing buys only ~+1pp on the assembly clock, and digging with real card costs bleeds held protection (66→60% by T4). Mulligan clearly dead hands once; keep serviceable sixes.

killTree.title: Croak and Dagger — Glarb, Calamity's Augur
killTree.root:
Glarb + Sensei's Divining Top online ({T}: draw a card, put Top back on top)
a no-MV-restriction top-caster lets you RECAST Top off the library each loop → chain the deck
killTree.stall:
dig with Glarb surveil 2 + Top + Sylvan toward Top + any enabler + any payoff;
combo on YOUR turn behind the counter suite + Tidal Barracuda (opponents can't cast on your turn)
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

lines.need:
Sensei's Top + a top-caster (Bolas's Citadel / One with the Multiverse /
Fortune Teller's L2 / Reality Chip) + Aetherflux Reservoir
lines.kill: loop Top casts → bank 50+ life → Pay 50: deal 50 to each opponent (a counter-immune ability)

lines.need:
same loop, Ancient Cellarspawn as the payoff
(drain on each under-costed cast)
lines.kill: every free / discounted Top recast drains an opponent → table (redundant 2nd payoff)

lines.need:
topdeck tutors (Insidious Dreams / Emergent Ultimatum / Scheming Symmetry)
stack the missing category on top for Glarb / Citadel
lines.kill: assemble the 3-category loop a turn or two sooner (GSZ / Chord / Finale fetch the creature pieces)

lines.need:
Torment of Hailfire X=12+ (~14 mana via Cabal Coffers + Urborg)
— the board-independent grind backup when the combo bricks (~10%)
lines.kill: each opponent: 12× lose-3 / sac / discard → lethal table drain

lines.need:
Archon of Cruelty / Massacre Wurm value + Glarb beats
(fallback)
